scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix thalai-backend && npm install --prefix thalai-frontend && pip install -r thalai-ai-service/requirements.txt
scripts.deploy: npm run install-all && npm run build:frontend
scripts.prod: concurrently "npm start --prefix thalai-backend" "cd thalai-ai-service && gunicorn app:app"
scripts.setup-env: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const env=fs.readFileSync('.env', 'utf8'); fs.writeFileSync('thalai-backend/.env', env); fs.writeFileSync('thalai-frontend/.env', env); fs.writeFileSync('thalai-ai-service/.env', env); console.log('✅ Env synchronized to all services')"
scripts.start-all: concurrently "npm run backend" "npm run frontend" "npm run ai"
